text: - 3.6 Contractor may assess a $250 fine for each meeting (each occurrence) where Subcontractor fails to provide adequate representation. Persistent non-compliance with the terms of this section authorizes Contractor to implement more extreme measures up-to but not limited to removal and replacement of Subcontractor's supervisory staff, supplementation of Subcontractor's work, and/or termination of the Subcontract Agreement.
